world.title: Oil Tanker Company Paid Iran $2million For Safe Passage Through Strait Of Hormuz - Report
world.description: Amid escalating tensions and ongoing conflict in West Asia, a new report has revealed that a private oil tanker company paid about $2million to Iran to secure safe passage through the strategic Strait of Hormuz.  According to maritime intelligence publication Lloyd’s List, Iranian authorities have established a controlled shipping corridor within their territorial waters, allowing selected vessels to pass through the volatile route after receiving approval.

world.title: US, allies ammo production in PH
world.description: (UPDATE) WASHINGTON, D.C. — A US-led defense manufacturing partnership agreed to launch a new missile motor production program with Japan, push forward a drone cooperation effort across Asia, and explore building a new ammunition production line in the Philippines, the Pentagon said on Friday.

ai.title: AI Meets Justice: Striking a Balance in the Judiciary
ai.description: CJI Justice Surya Kant emphasizes the need to integrate Artificial Intelligence into the judiciary to enhance efficiency without overshadowing human judgment. Speaking at a seminar, he warned against AI's dominance in decision-making, advocating for AI as a supportive tool while maintaining human oversight in final judgments.
